creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

netchild    2009-05-26 13:36:08 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail/postfix         Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    mail/postfix/files   patch-makedefs postfix.sh.in 
  Added files:
    mail/postfix/files   pkg-install.in pkg-message.in 
  Removed files:
    mail/postfix         pkg-install pkg-message 
    mail/postfix/files   patch-conf::main.cf 
                         patch-conf::post-install 
                         patch-src::global::mail_params.h 
  Log:
  - refactor the port to ease maintenance [1]
  - update to 2.6.1 [1]
  - remove IGNORE in the VDA case, the patch is available now [2]
  
  [2] is from me (compile tested), maintainer informed.
  
  PR:             134728 [1]
  Submitted by:   Yarema <yds@CoolRat.org> [1]
  Approved by:    maintainer [1]
